posts.author: BakingWithElara
posts.text: Finally mastered my sourdough! The crust is cracking perfectly and the crumb looks so airy. It's been a long journey but totally worth it. #baking #sourdough #homemade
posts.explanation: This post is a harmless personal update about a hobby and creative achievement with no policy violations, so it should be approved.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: MoorvaleMarketFan
posts.text: Exciting news for all our local traders! The annual Moorvale Market Fair is back this Saturday. We'll have fresh produce, artisan crafts, and live music starting at 10am in the town square. Come along to support our community businesses! #Moorvale #LocalEvents #MarketFair
posts.explanation: This is a harmless announcement for a fictional market event with no threats, scams, or privacy violations present.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.
